name: cloud-mp-foundation
description: CloudBase migration foundation scripts for the mini program and admin stack

scripts.seed:prepare: npm run seed:normalize && npm run seed:build-import
scripts.import:prep: npm run check:foundation && npm run import:ready && npm run import:validate
scripts.release:check: npm run check:foundation && npm run import:validate && npm run audit:legacy && node scripts/check-production-gaps.js
